mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role_type = 'elderly' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role_type = 'family' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role_type = 'caregiver' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emergency_help WHERE help_status IN ('handling', 'completed') AND is_deleted = 0 AND created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data WHERE health_status = 'abnormal' AND is_deleted = 0 AND monitor_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data WHERE health_status = 'abnormal' AND is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(monitor_time) = #{date}

SELECT u.real_name as name, COUNT(so.id) as count FROM service_order so LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON so.caregiver_id = u.id WHERE so.caregiver_id IS NOT NULL AND so.is_deleted = 0 AND so.created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY so.caregiver_id, u.real_name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT service_type as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM service_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY service_type ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT health_status as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM health_data WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND monitor_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY health_status ORDER BY value DESC
